ddl.using:
exists (
          select 1
          from "collection" c
          where c.id = "sync_job"."collectionId"
            and c."userId" = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)::integer
        )
ddl.withCheck:
exists (
          select 1
          from "collection" c
          where c.id = "sync_job"."collectionId"
            and c."userId" = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)::integer
        )
ddl.name: sync_job_user_isolation
